name: engineering-cybernetics
description: Route evolving software, agent, business, and physical tasks into observable feedback loops.

interface.longDescription: Detects control problems and loads the smallest observable feedback loop needed for software, agents, business workflows, or physical systems.
defaultPrompt: Turn this evolving task into a measurable feedback loop.
Find the missing observation, action, or safety boundary.
Design the smallest real control loop for this workflow.
